rkm.project.golfgame

      Reset the quad tree by emptying the list of polygon surfaces

      Generates an array of x coordinates from the 4 vertices that make up the region

    • Constructor Detail

      • QuadTree

        public QuadTree()
        Empty constructor

      • QuadTree

        public QuadTree(float regionDimension,
                int limitNbOfIntersectingTriangles,
                float xStart,
                float yStart)
        QuadTree constructor
        Parameters:
        regionDimension - dimension of a quad tree quarter
        limitNbOfIntersectingTriangles - limit number number of triangles intersecting a quarter cut
        xStart - starting x coordinate
        yStart - starting y coordinate

      • QuadTree

        public QuadTree(int regionDimension,
                int limitNbOfIntersectingTriangles,
                float xStart,
                float yStart,
                QuadTree childNW,
                QuadTree childNE,
                QuadTree childSE,
                QuadTree childSW)
        QuadTree constructor
        Parameters:
        regionDimension - dimension of a quad tree quarter
        limitNbOfIntersectingTriangles - limit number number of triangles intersecting a quarter cut
        xStart - starting x coordinate
        yStart - starting y coordinate
        childNW - north west child node
        childNE - north east child node
        childSE - south east child node
        childSW - south west child node

        Retrieves the list of intersected triangles
        Returns:
        list containing the intersected triangles

        Array of quadtree child nodes

        Reset the quad tree by emptying the list of polygon surfaces

        public void setLimiteIntersectionsTriangles(int limit)
        Set a new limit to number of intersected triangles per region
        Parameters:
        limit - limit number of intersections between triangles and the region

        Build a QuadTree

      • containsPoint

        public QuadTree containsPoint(Point<java.lang.Float> point)
        Check if current region contains the given point
        Parameters:
        point - point to check whether is contained by this quarter or not
        Returns:
        regionContenantPoint if point is contained, else return false

        Returns the number of child nodes

      • intersectsTriangle

        public java.lang.Boolean intersectsTriangle(Triangle triangle)
        Test if this region intersects a triangle
        Parameters:
        triangle - to test whether intersects this region or not
        Returns:
        regionIntersectsTriangle boolean true if region intersects the given triangle, else return false

        Returns:

        Generates an array of x coordinates from the 4 vertices that make up the region

        Generates an array of y coordinates from the 4 vertices that make up the region

        Test if a point is inside a region

        pt - to test whether is inside region
        Returns:
        boolean true if point is inside region else otherwise
